# siea.dev

> Personal site of Finley Voßwinkel (Sieadev) — fullstack developer from Germany.

Sieadev builds backend systems, Java frameworks, Discord bots, and web apps. Works at Pixel Services.

## Pages

- [Home](https://siea.dev/): About Sieadev, skills, and contact links
- [Projects](https://siea.dev/projects): Open-source and personal projects
- [Journey](https://siea.dev/journey): Education and career timeline
- [Contact](https://siea.dev/contact): Send a message via email client
- [Terms of Service](https://siea.dev/tos): Legal terms

## Projects

- [Jonion](https://siea.dev/projects/jonion): Lightweight Java plugin framework ([docs](https://docs.siea.dev/jonion/))
- [Mobot](https://siea.dev/projects/mobot): Modular Discord bot framework ([docs](https://docs.siea.dev/mobot/))
- [Unifi4J](https://siea.dev/projects/unifi4j): Java client for the UniFi Network API ([docs](https://docs.siea.dev/unifi4j/))

## Agent resources

- [Full site summary](https://siea.dev/llms-full.txt)
- [Docs](https://docs.siea.dev/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/sieadev)
- [Agent skills index](https://siea.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)

## Markdown

Request any page with `Accept: text/markdown` to receive a markdown representation.
